glosses.vi: chuyến tham quan; chuyến du ngoạn

sentences.target: Wir machen morgen eine Rundfahrt durch die Stadt.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈmaxən ˈmɔʁɡən ˈaɪ̯nə ˈʁʊntfaːʁt dʊʁç diː ʃtat/

translations.de: Wir machen morgen eine Rundfahrt durch die Stadt.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈmaxən ˈmɔʁɡən ˈaɪ̯nə ˈʁʊntfaːʁt dʊʁç diː ʃtat/
translations.en: We’re doing a city tour tomorrow.
translations.es: Mañana haremos un recorrido por la ciudad.
translations.fr: Demain, on fait un tour de la ville.
translations.it: Domani facciamo un giro della città.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们明天去参加城市观光。
translations.yue: 我哋聽日去參加城市觀光團。
translations.ru: Мы завтра поедем на экскурсию по городу.
translations.pt: Amanhã vamos fazer um passeio pela cidade.
translations.vi: Ngày mai chúng tôi đi tham quan thành phố.
translations.nl: Morgen maken we een rondrit door de stad.
translations.uk: Ми завтра їдемо на екскурсію містом.
translations.hi: हम कल शहर की सैर करने जा रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Jutro jedziemy na wycieczkę po mieście.
translations.el: Αύριο θα κάνουμε ξενάγηση στην πόλη.
translations.nb: I morgen drar vi på sightseeing i byen.
translations.id: Besok kami ikut tur keliling kota.
translations.sv: I morgon gör vi en rundtur i stan.
translations.ro: Mâine facem un tur al orașului.
translations.da: I morgen tager vi på byrundtur.
translations.ja: 明日、市内観光に行くよ。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person plural; nominative; subject of the clause.
Main lexical verb; finite; present indicative; 1st person plural; selects a direct object ('eine Rundfahrt') and a PP ('durch die Stadt').
Temporal adverb; modifies the predicate; indicates time (tomorrow).
Indefinite article determiner; feminine; accusative singular; introduces the object noun.
Common noun; feminine; accusative singular; direct object; compound meaning 'tour'.
Preposition; governs accusative; heads the PP expressing route ('durch die Stadt').
Definite article determiner; feminine; accusative singular; modifies 'Stadt'.
Common noun; feminine; accusative singular; object of the preposition 'durch'.

translations.vi: Chuyến tham quan kéo dài hai giờ.
translations.hi: टूर दो घंटे तक चलता है.
translations.ja: ツアーは二時間かかります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article determiner; feminine; nominative singular; modifies 'Rundfahrt'.
Common noun; feminine; nominative singular; subject.
Intransitive verb; finite; present indicative; 3rd person singular; expresses duration.
Cardinal numeral; modifies 'Stunden'; quantity two.
Common noun; feminine; accusative plural; duration/measure phrase (extent).

sentences.target: Ich buche eine Rundfahrt mit dem Schiff.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈbuːxə ˈaɪ̯nə ˈʁʊntfaːʁt mɪt deːm ʃɪf/

translations.de: Ich buche eine Rundfahrt mit dem Schiff.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈbuːxə ˈaɪ̯nə ˈʁʊntfaːʁt mɪt deːm ʃɪf/
translations.es: Estoy reservando un paseo en barco.
translations.fr: Je réserve une balade en bateau.
translations.it: Sto prenotando un giro in barca.
translations.pt: Estou reservando um passeio de barco.
translations.vi: Tôi đang đặt chuyến tham quan bằng thuyền.
translations.hi: मैं नाव की सैर बुक कर रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Κάνω κράτηση για ξενάγηση με σκάφος.
translations.id: Saya sedang memesan tur dengan kapal.
translations.ja: ボートツアーを予約しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular; nominative; subject.
Transitive verb; finite; present indicative; 1st person singular; takes object ('eine Rundfahrt') and PP ('mit dem Schiff') indicating means.
Indefinite article determiner; feminine; accusative singular; modifies 'Rundfahrt'.
Common noun; feminine; accusative singular; direct object.
Preposition; governs dative; introduces PP indicating accompaniment/means.
Definite article determiner; neuter; dative singular; modifies 'Schiff'.
Common noun; neuter; dative singular; object of the preposition 'mit' (means).

sentences.target: Meine Eltern lieben die Rundfahrt am Abend.
sentences.reading: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈɛltɐn ˈliːbən diː ˈʁʊntfaːʁt am ˈaːbənt/

translations.de: Meine Eltern lieben die Rundfahrt am Abend.
translations.ipa: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈɛltɐn ˈliːbən diː ˈʁʊntfaːʁt am ˈaːbənt/
translations.en: My parents love the evening tour.
translations.es: A mis padres les encanta el paseo al atardecer.
translations.fr: Mes parents adorent la visite du soir.
translations.it: I miei genitori adorano il giro serale.
translations.yue: 我父母好鍾意夜晚嘅觀光團。
translations.pt: Meus pais adoram o passeio à noite.
translations.he: ההורים שלי אוהבים את הסיור בערב.
translations.tr: Annemle babam akşam turunu çok seviyor.
translations.vi: Bố mẹ tôi thích chuyến tham quan buổi tối.
translations.nl: Mijn ouders houden van de avondrondrit.
translations.hu: A szüleim imádják az esti városnézést.
translations.hi: मेरे माता-पिता शाम की सैर पसंद करते हैं.
translations.el: Οι γονείς μου λατρεύουν τη βραδινή ξενάγηση.
translations.nb: Foreldrene mine elsker rundturen om kvelden.
translations.id: Orang tua saya suka tur malam.
translations.ro: Părinții mei adoră turul de seară.
translations.ja: 私の両親は夜のツアーが大好きです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; 1st person singular possessor; nominative plural form; modifies 'Eltern'.
Common noun; plural; nominative; subject.
Transitive verb; finite; present indicative; 3rd person plural; selects direct object ('die Rundfahrt').
Definite article determiner; feminine; accusative singular; modifies 'Rundfahrt'.
Common noun; feminine; accusative singular; direct object; followed by PP 'am Abend'.
Preposition (contraction of 'an' + 'dem'); governs dative; forms a temporal PP modifying 'Rundfahrt'.
Common noun; masculine; dative singular; object of the preposition 'am'; time expression.
